a.xlink:title: Returns a printing of a card from the same set as another given printing when possible.
Converts a CardRef into an ExactCard.
Returns the CardDatabaseQuerier of the singleton database.
Returns a reference to the underlying CardInfo object.
Convenience helper to get the card's display name.
Retrieves a card by its exact name.
Determines whether another instance can be created.
Returns the name of the related card.
Returns the printing information associated with this card.
Returns the providerID for this printing.
Returns the underlying CardInfoPtr.
Returns the set this printing belongs to.
Retrieves a specific printing referenced by CardRef.
Attempts a more flexible card lookup using both simple name matching and CardRef rules.
check if the info is empty, as if default constructed.
Searches for a printing that matches a given providerId.
Returns the preferred printing for the given card name.
Looks up a card using exact name first, then simplified matching as fallback.
Returns the singleton CardDatabase instance.
Returns the querier for performing card lookups.
Returns true if the card is attached to another.
Creates a new instance with only the card name.
